query: SELECT t.entityId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM crm_tasks t WHERE t.tenantId = 1 AND t.entityType = 'deal' GROUP BY t.entityId LIMIT 10; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_deal_tasks FROM crm_tasks WHERE tenantId = 1 AND entityType = 'deal'; SELECT COUNT(*) as tasks_with_valid_deal FROM crm_tasks t INNER JOIN deals d ON t.entityId = d.id WHERE t.tenantId = 1 AND t.entityType = 'deal';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT t.entityId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM crm_tasks t WHERE t.tenantId = 1 AND t.entityType = 'deal' GROUP BY t.entityId LIMIT 10; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_deal_tasks FROM crm_tasks WHERE tenantId = 1 AND entityType = 'deal'; SELECT COUNT(*) as tasks_with_valid_deal FROM crm_tasks t INNER JOIN deals d ON t.entityId = d.id WHERE t.tenantId = 1 AND t.entityType = 'deal';
